data.title: Enphase Energy adds battery backup to boost resilience in France and the Netherlands
data.description:
• Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) Thursday announced the introduction of the IQ System Controller in France and the Netherlands.
  • The system integrates Enphase's IQ Microinverters and IQ Battery 5Ps to provide comprehensive energy solution that enables homeowners to seamlessly transition to backup power during grid outages.
  • "Our expansion into the European market with the IQ System Controller is another important milestone for Enphase as we continue to grow our footprint across the globe," said Sabbas Daniel, senior vice president of sales at Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH).

data.title: Newegg's reverse stock split to take effect from April 7
data.description:
• Newegg Commerce (NASDAQ:NEGG) on Thursday said that its twenty-to-one share combination of its common shares will become effective on April 7, 2025.
  • This will result in a proportionate increase to the par value of the company’s common shares from $0.021848 per share to $0.43696 per share.
  • The share combination is intended to enable the company to continue to meet minimum Nasdaq listing price per share requirements and will affect all shareholders proportionately.
  • NEGG -1.33% premarket to $0.266.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Fintech Plaid raises $575M, eyes IPO - report
data.description:
San Francisco-based fintech Plaid has raised $575M through common stock offering and is eyeing an IPO, the online newspaper TechCrunch reported on Thursday, April 3, citing a spokesperson.

The proceeds will be used to address employee tax withholding obligations related to the conversion of expiring restricted stock units to shares. Additionally, it will be used to offer some liquidity to the current team, Plaid said in a blog post.

The capital raise is said to have valued the company at $6.1B, less than half of the $13.4B valuation reported in Plaid's April 2021 $425M series D funding round.

The decrease in valuation was "simply a reflection of the contraction of multiples across the market", the spokesperson reportedly said.

The fintech does not plan to launch an IPO this year, but it is a milestone Plaid continues "to track towards", the spokesperson told the newspaper.

Franklin Templeton led the sale of common stock. The capital raise saw participation from new investors, including Fidelity Management and Research, BlackRock, and others, and existing investors NEA and Ribbit Capital.

data.title: UBS warns that Trump’s tariffs could pose large risks to economic growth
data.description:
UBS raised concerns Thursday morning about the potential economic impact of the U.S. administration's proposed tariff plan. The global investment bank argued that the tariffs could pose significant headwinds to growth and overall economic health.

According to UBS, the magnitude of the tariffs under consideration is substantial enough to jeopardize the ongoing economic expansion if they remain in place for an extended period of time. The investment bank emphasized that the inflationary effects of these tariffs would likely be noticable as well. 

"We expect the inflation impact of these new tariff rates to be considerable," UBS stated. They warned that the cost of imports would increase significantly, contributing to higher prices across the economy. 

Through simple “back-of-envelope calculations” UBS suggested that if the proposed tariffs were fully implemented and remained in effect long-term, inflation could surge to around 5%. This would occur as businesses adjust to the increased cost of foreign goods, which would ultimately be passed on to consumers. 

UBS’s caution underscores the potential for the tariff plan to disrupt the broader economic landscape, with inflation and growth potentially taking a hit if the tariffs are enacted permanently. 

To keep a pulse on the market, investors can look towards both market tracking and fixed income funds as the Dow (DJI), S&P 500 (SP500), and Nasdaq Composite (COMP:IND) crater.

data.title: Leidos wins up to $390M NSA contract for signals intelligence capabilities
data.description:
• Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) has secured a new contract to provide signals intelligence capabilities, engineering, analysis and reporting tools to the National Security Agency (NSA).
  • The base year plus four option years single-award contract has a ceiling value of $390 million.
  • Leidos will perform technical, engineering, systems administration and management tasks to deliver signals intelligence capabilities, analysis and reporting tool modifications, engineering services, lab and testbed management, integration and testing, deployment and training.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Aurania launches private placement of up to C$1.5M
data.description:
• Aurania Resources (TSXV:ARU:CA) intends to complete a non-brokered private placement financing of up to 5M units of the company for total gross proceeds of up to C$1.5M.
  • The Company has reserved the right to increase the size of the offering by up to 25%, such that up to an additional 1.25M units may be issued to raise additional gross proceeds of up to C$375,000.
  • Each unit will consist of one common share of the company and one common share purchase warrant. Each warrant will entitle the holder to purchase one common share at an exercise price of C$0.55 per warrant share for a period of 24 months following the closing of the offering.The company intends to use the net proceeds from the offering primarily for general working capital purposes and also may use such proceeds for the payment of any required mineral concession fees in Ecuador.
  • The offering is anticipated to be completed on or about April 23, 2025.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: U.S. Bancorp downgraded to Underweight at J.P. Morgan amid macro uncertainty
data.description:
J.P. Morgan lowered its rating on U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) to Underweight from Neutral as several factors weigh on the bank amid an uncertain macro environment.

In its Q1 large-cap banks preview, J.P. Morgan sees Wednesday's tariffs announcement hurting banks overall on investment banking, consumer spending, loan growth, and wealth management.

Analyst Vivek Juneja notes that USB has a greater share of growth coming from its push into investment banking, a sizable payments impact would be affected by slower spending, and sizable credit card loans (8% of loans at year-end 2024) that have a relatively high loss rate compared with its peers.

"Longer term, this is a good strategy, and USB is undergoing an overdue management change, but the outlook would relatively be tempered in the near term," Juneja wrote in a note to clients.

U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) stock fell 2.2% in Thursday premarket trading.

J.P. Morgan's Underweight rating on the stock contrasts with the SA Quant rating and the average SA Analyst rating, both at Hold, and the average Wall Street rating of Buy.

data.title: Sonim Technologies receives unsolicited buyout proposal for $4 per share
data.description:
• Sonim Technologies (NASDAQ:SONM) said on Thursday that it has received  an unsolicited non-binding proposal from Orbic North America, to acquire all outstanding shares of Sonim Technologies for $4.00 per share in cash.
  • Sonim is carefully reviewing and evaluating the proposal in consultation with its legal and financial advisors.
  • The company emphasized that there is no assurance the evaluation process will result in any transaction. 
  • Sonim Technologies (NASDAQ:SONM) shares were up more than 5% in premarket trading.

data.title: Lucid tops Q1 deliveries expectations and outpaces last year's tally
data.description:
Lucid Group (NASDAQ:LCID) announced that it produced 2,212 vehicles for the quarter that ended on March 31, and had over 600 additional vehicles in transit to Saudi Arabia for final assembly. The company delivered 3,109 vehicles during the quarter to top the consensus estimate of 2,947 vehicles.

By comparison, the company delivered 1,927 vehicles for the same quarter a year ago and delivered 3,099 in Q4 of 2024. In total, Lucid delivered 10,241 vehicles in 2024, marking a significant year-over-year increase of 70% compared to 2023.

Looking ahead, the electric vehicle maker set its Q1 earnings report for May 6.

Shares of Lucid Group (NASDAQ:LCID) were down 3.8% in premarket action to $2.31 vs. the 52-week range of $1.93 to $4.43. Short interest on the EV stock is 9.4% of the total float.

data.title: GFG launches C$2.5M flow-through private placement
data.description:
• GFG Resources (TSXV:GFG:CA)on Thursday announced a private placement of up to 9.2M premium flow-through units to raise gross proceeds of up to C$2.5M.
  • Each premium unit will consist of one common share of the company and one-half of one share purchase warrant, with each whole share purchase warrant entitling the holder to acquire one additional common share of the company at an exercise price of C$0.28 for a period of 24 months from the date of issuance.
  • Alamos Gold (NYSE:AGI) has committed to purchase securities in the offering to maintain their position at a 10.8% interest in the ompany upon completion of the offering, the company said.
  • The offering is scheduled to close on or about May 2, 2025.
  • AGI -4.14% premarket to $25.41.
  • Source: Press Release
